_comment: Data-driven SEO landing pages. Each key is a URL slug served by the /<page> route (app.py) via templates/seo_page.html. Add a new page here + a <url> in static/sitemap.xml — no code change needed. Keep titles ~55-60 chars, meta ~150-160.

free-text-to-speech.title: Free Text to Speech Online — Natural AI Voices | SastaSpeech
free-text-to-speech.meta: Turn text into natural, expressive AI speech for free. Any language, real emotion, studio quality. Start free — no credit card needed.
free-text-to-speech.h1: Free Text to Speech, with Real Emotion
free-text-to-speech.sub: Type anything and hear it spoken in a natural, expressive AI voice — in almost any language. Start free, no credit card.
free-text-to-speech.intro: Most free text-to-speech tools sound flat and robotic. SastaSpeech uses ElevenLabs v3 voices and per-sentence emotion tags, so your words are actually performed — whispered, excited, or calm — not just read aloud. Try it free, today.

sections.p: Powered by ElevenLabs v3, the voices sound human across dozens of languages — with real intonation, pacing, and emotion. No more monotone narration.
The free plan gives you a daily generation so you can test the full pipeline end to end. Upgrade only when you need more — plans start at just ₹49.
Toggle emotion tags and our Gemini-powered pipeline picks the right cue for every sentence — [happy], [whispers], [sobbing], [excited] and 50+ more — then the voice performs it.

faq.a: Yes — the free plan includes a daily generation up to 100 characters, enough to try the full text-to-speech pipeline. No credit card required.
Dozens, including English, Spanish, French, German, Hindi, Portuguese and Arabic, each with natural, native-sounding prosody.
Yes. Generated audio is yours to download and, on any paid plan, use commercially in videos, podcasts, ads and more.

elevenlabs-alternative.title: Affordable ElevenLabs Alternative — From ₹49 | SastaSpeech
elevenlabs-alternative.meta: Looking for a cheaper ElevenLabs alternative? SastaSpeech gives you the same v3 voice quality and emotion tags from ₹49, with a real free plan.
elevenlabs-alternative.sub: Same studio-quality v3 voices and emotion tags — at a fraction of the price. Start free, scale from ₹49.
elevenlabs-alternative.intro: SastaSpeech is built on the same ElevenLabs v3 engine you already trust for expressive, multilingual speech — but packaged for creators who want honest, transparent pricing. You get per-sentence emotion control and a genuinely usable free tier, without the steep monthly commitment.

sections.p: We use ElevenLabs v3 for voice and Gemini for text refinement. Pricing is built on real per-character cost plus a sensible margin — a day pass is ₹49, monthly plans start at ₹299.

sections.h: Pay only for what you use
sections.p: Character-by-character usage is shown right in the app. One-time top-ups stack on any plan, so you are never locked into a big subscription to finish a project.
Multilingual voices, automatic emotion tagging, and audio ready to drop into your editor in seconds — for YouTube, podcasts, ads and courses.

faq.q: Is the voice quality the same as ElevenLabs?
faq.a: Yes — SastaSpeech generates voice using ElevenLabs v3, including inline emotion tags, so output quality matches what you would get directly.
You can start free, grab a ₹49 day-pass top-up, or take a monthly plan from ₹299 — with usage shown transparently so there are no surprise bills.

faq.q: Do I need a long-term subscription?
faq.a: No. One-time top-ups let you add credits to any plan, including free, so you can pay as you go.

ai-voiceover-for-youtube.title: AI Voiceover for YouTube Videos & Shorts | SastaSpeech
ai-voiceover-for-youtube.meta: Create natural AI voiceovers for YouTube videos, Shorts and Reels in seconds. Expressive, multilingual, commercial-use ready. Start free.
ai-voiceover-for-youtube.h1: AI Voiceovers for YouTube, in Seconds
ai-voiceover-for-youtube.sub: Turn your script into a natural, expressive narrator's voice — perfect for videos, Shorts and Reels. Commercial-use ready.
ai-voiceover-for-youtube.intro: Faceless channels, explainers, Shorts, documentaries — they all live and die by the voiceover. SastaSpeech gives your script a real narrator's voice with genuine emotion, in almost any language, fast enough to keep up with a daily upload schedule.

sections.p: ElevenLabs v3 voices deliver natural pacing and emotion — so your videos hold attention instead of sounding like a robot reading a list.
A typical 500-character script is voiced end to end in under 10 seconds. No queue, no waitlist — write, generate, edit, publish.
On any paid plan the audio is yours to use commercially — YouTube monetization, ads, sponsorships and courses included.

faq.q: Can I use the audio on a monetized channel?
faq.a: Yes. Audio generated on a paid plan can be used in monetized YouTube videos, Shorts, ads and other commercial work.

faq.q: Is it good for faceless channels?
faq.a: Absolutely — expressive, consistent narration is exactly what faceless and explainer channels need, in the language of your audience.

faq.q: How long can my script be?
faq.a: Per-request length depends on your plan; longer scripts are automatically chunked and stitched into one clean audio file.

text-to-speech-with-emotion.title: Text to Speech with Emotion — AI Voice Tags | SastaSpeech
text-to-speech-with-emotion.meta: Generate text to speech with real emotion. 60+ inline tags — [happy], [sobbing], [whispers] — added automatically. Any language. Start free.
text-to-speech-with-emotion.h1: Text to Speech That Actually Has Emotion
text-to-speech-with-emotion.sub: Whisper, shout, laugh, cry — 60+ emotion tags performed automatically, in any language. Start free.
text-to-speech-with-emotion.intro: Plain text-to-speech reads words. SastaSpeech performs them. Our Gemini-powered pipeline analyzes every sentence and picks the right inline performance cue, then ElevenLabs v3 renders it in the voice — so a sad line sounds sad and an excited line lands with energy.

sections.p: From [happy], [excited] and [whispers] to [sobbing], [giggles] and [breathless] — the model performs the cue, it doesn't read it out. You can leave it automatic or fine-tune.
Toggle emotion tags and Gemini classifies each sentence, choosing the most natural cue. No manual tagging, no guesswork — just paste your script and generate.
Emotion isn't English-only. The same expressive range works across the dozens of languages ElevenLabs v3 supports.

faq.q: How do the emotion tags work?
faq.a: When enabled, Gemini reads each sentence and inserts an inline cue like [whispers] or [excited]; ElevenLabs v3 then performs that cue in the generated voice.

faq.q: Do I have to tag sentences myself?
faq.a: No — tagging is automatic. Advanced users can still adjust the refined text before generating if they want precise control.

faq.q: Does emotion work in non-English languages?
faq.a: Yes, the expressive performance carries across all supported languages, not just English.

hindi-text-to-speech.title: Hindi Text to Speech with Real Emotion | SastaSpeech
hindi-text-to-speech.meta: Natural Hindi & Hinglish text to speech with real emotion. Studio-quality AI voiceovers for creators — from ₹49. Start free, no card.
hindi-text-to-speech.h1: Hindi Text to Speech, with Real Emotion
hindi-text-to-speech.sub: Natural Hindi and Hinglish narration that actually sounds human — expressive, fast and affordable. Start free.
hindi-text-to-speech.intro: Hindi content deserves more than a robotic voice. SastaSpeech delivers natural Hindi and Hinglish speech with real emotional range — built on ElevenLabs v3 and tuned with per-sentence emotion tags — so your stories, explainers and ads connect with Indian audiences.

sections.p: Mix Devanagari, Roman Hindi and English freely. The voices handle code-mixed scripts the way people actually speak.
A heartfelt line sounds heartfelt; a punchy ad line lands. Gemini tags each sentence and the voice performs it — automatically.
Start free, grab a ₹49 top-up when you need a few more, or go monthly from ₹299. Usage is shown transparently.

faq.a: Yes — mixed Hindi-English (Hinglish) scripts in both Devanagari and Roman text are fully supported.

faq.q: How natural is the Hindi voice?
faq.a: Very — it uses ElevenLabs v3 with natural prosody and per-sentence emotion, far beyond traditional robotic Hindi TTS.
There's a free daily generation, a ₹49 one-time top-up, and monthly plans from ₹299 with higher limits.
